pages.title: One Recording, Three Radios
pages.kicker: Transport may change, but recording identity and recovery rules must remain stable.

cards.title: Recording identity
cards.body: Sequence numbers and idempotent state keep every route attached to one logical object.

cards.title: BLE relay
cards.body: The phone provides nearby control, synchronization, network access, and heartbeat forwarding.

cards.title: Direct Wi-Fi
cards.body: A provisioned device uploads independently when a trusted network is available.

cards.title: Direct cellular
cards.body: Field coverage trades more power and cost for independence from phone and Wi-Fi.

pages.title: Offline Audio Becomes Agent Context
pages.kicker: The useful product object is governed context, not an isolated audio file.

cards.title: Durable audio
cards.body: Captured speech retains timestamps, recording identity, and transport provenance.

cards.title: Speech artifacts
cards.body: ASR and diarization produce versioned text, speakers, timing, and confidence.

cards.title: Governed context
cards.body: Corrections, provenance, permissions, and artifact versions remain attached.

cards.title: Product action
cards.body: An agent can retrieve, draft, confirm, commit, or abstain inside the workflow.
